eligibility.label: Minimum CLB 5 in English or French
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Language proficiency does not meet the minimum CLB 5 requirement for the Start-Up Visa

eligibility.label: Minimum one-year post-secondary credential
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Education level does not meet the minimum post-secondary credential requirement

eligibility.label: Demonstrated entrepreneurial experience or business concept
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Business experience is below the recommended threshold for securing a letter of support
